statements.reason: Core transformation: full-refresh load joining source PO/lines with dimension lookups and derived measures

scoping.logic_summary: Full-refresh ETL that truncates and reloads dbo.Fact_PurchaseOrder. Joins PurchaseOrders and PurchaseOrderLines from source (PTP_System) to four conformed dimensions (Vendor, Product, Employee x2, Date x2) using SCD2 IsCurrent=1 lookups with ISNULL/-1/0 defaults for missing matches. Computes three derived measures: PO_Line_Total (qty * agreed price), Price_Savings_vs_Estimate (estimated minus agreed price * qty, nullable when no upstream requisition), and Approval_Duration_Days (DATEDIFF from requisition date to PO date, nullable). Maps cleanly to a dbt table model.

classification.rationale: The writer proc uses TRUNCATE + INSERT with a transactional grain of one row per PO line, multiple FK surrogate key columns, and numeric measure columns; no snapshot date, aggregation, MERGE, or accumulating milestone pattern is present.

primary_key.rationale: Catalog declares constraint PK_Fact_PO on Fact_PO_SK, which is also an IDENTITY column confirming it as a system-assigned surrogate key.

natural_key.rationale: The proc inserts PONumber as PO_BK and LineNumber as PO_Line_Number from the source PurchaseOrders and PurchaseOrderLines tables, forming the unique business grain for a PO line.

watermark.rationale: The proc performs a full TRUNCATE + INSERT with no incremental filter; DW_Load_DateTime is the only load-timestamp column and represents the best watermark candidate, though full table materialization is recommended given the full-reload pattern.

foreign_keys.rationale: Declared FK FK_FactPO_Buyer; both Buyer_Employee_SK and Approver_Employee_SK join Dim_Employee, making this a role-playing dimension.
Declared FK FK_FactPO_Approver; second role on Dim_Employee alongside Buyer_Employee_SK, confirming role-playing pattern.
Declared FK FK_FactPO_PODate; both PODate_SK and ExpectedDelivery_SK join Dim_Date, making this a role-playing dimension.
Declared FK FK_FactPO_ExpDel; second role on Dim_Date alongside PODate_SK, confirming role-playing pattern.
Declared FK FK_FactPO_Product; single column joining one dimension with no multi-role pattern.
Declared FK FK_FactPO_Vendor; single column joining one dimension with no multi-role pattern.
VARCHAR business key (PONumber from source) stored directly in the fact table with no corresponding dimension join target.
Nullable VARCHAR business key (RequisitionNumber from source) stored directly in the fact table with no corresponding dimension join target.

refactor.extracted_sql: SELECT po.PONumber AS PO_BK, pol.LineNumber AS PO_Line_Number, req.RequisitionNumber AS Requisition_BK, -- Date dimension ISNULL(d_po.Date_SK, 0) AS PODate_SK, ISNULL(d_exp.Date_SK, 0) AS ExpectedDelivery_SK, -- Conformed dimensions ISNULL(vnd.Vendor_SK, -1) AS Vendor_SK, ISNULL(prod.Product_SK,-1) AS Product_SK, ISNULL(emp_buyer.Employee_SK, -1) AS Buyer_Employee_SK, ISNULL(emp_approver.Employee_SK, -1) AS Approver_Employee_SK, po.POStatus AS PO_Status, -- Core measures pol.Quantity AS Quantity_Ordered, pol.AgreedUnitPrice AS Agreed_Unit_Price, CAST(pol.Quantity * pol.AgreedUnitPrice AS DECIMAL(18,2)) AS PO_Line_Total, -- Negotiation effectiveness measures (from upstream requisition line) rl.EstimatedUnitPrice AS Estimated_Unit_Price, -- Positive = savings achieved vs the budget estimate CASE WHEN rl.EstimatedUnitPrice IS NOT NULL THEN CAST((rl.EstimatedUnitPrice - pol.AgreedUnitPrice) * pol.Quantity AS DECIMAL(18,2)) ELSE NULL END AS Price_Savings_vs_Estimate, -- Procurement lead time: days from requisition date to PO being raised CASE WHEN req.RequisitionDate IS NOT NULL THEN DATEDIFF(DAY, req.RequisitionDate, po.PODate) ELSE NULL END AS Approval_Duration_Days FROM PTP_System.Purchasing.PurchaseOrders po INNER JOIN PTP_System.Purchasing.PurchaseOrderLines pol ON pol.POID = po.POID INNER JOIN PTP_System.Master.Vendors src_vnd ON src_vnd.VendorID = po.VendorID INNER JOIN PTP_System.Master.Items src_itm ON src_itm.ItemID = pol.ItemID INNER JOIN PTP_System.Master.Employees src_buyer ON src_buyer.EmployeeID = po.OrderedByID -- Optional upstream requisition LEFT JOIN PTP_System.Purchasing.Requisitions req ON req.RequisitionID = po.RequisitionID LEFT JOIN PTP_System.Purchasing.RequisitionLines rl ON rl.RequisitionLineID = pol.RequisitionLineID -- Approver (optional) LEFT JOIN PTP_System.Master.Employees src_approver ON src_approver.EmployeeID = po.ApprovedByID -- Date dimension lookups LEFT JOIN dbo.Dim_Date d_po ON d_po.Date_SK = CAST(FORMAT(po.PODate, 'yyyyMMdd') AS INT) LEFT JOIN dbo.Dim_Date d_exp ON d_exp.Date_SK = CAST(FORMAT(po.ExpectedDelivery,'yyyyMMdd') AS INT) -- Conformed dimension lookups (current SCD2 version) LEFT JOIN dbo.Dim_Vendor vnd ON vnd.Vendor_BK = src_vnd.VendorCode AND vnd.IsCurrent = 1 LEFT JOIN dbo.Dim_Product prod ON prod.Product_BK = src_itm.ItemCode AND prod.IsCurrent = 1 LEFT JOIN dbo.Dim_Employee emp_buyer ON emp_buyer.Employee_BK = src_buyer.EmployeeCode AND emp_buyer.IsCurrent = 1 LEFT JOIN dbo.Dim_Employee emp_approver ON emp_approver.Employee_BK = src_approver.EmployeeCode AND emp_approver.IsCurrent = 1
refactor.refactored_sql: WITH source_purchase_orders AS ( SELECT * FROM PTP_System.Purchasing.PurchaseOrders ), source_purchase_order_lines AS ( SELECT * FROM PTP_System.Purchasing.PurchaseOrderLines ), source_vendors AS ( SELECT * FROM PTP_System.Master.Vendors ), source_items AS ( SELECT * FROM PTP_System.Master.Items ), source_employees AS ( SELECT * FROM PTP_System.Master.Employees ), source_requisitions AS ( SELECT * FROM PTP_System.Purchasing.Requisitions ), source_requisition_lines AS ( SELECT * FROM PTP_System.Purchasing.RequisitionLines ), dim_date AS ( SELECT * FROM dbo.Dim_Date ), dim_vendor AS ( SELECT * FROM dbo.Dim_Vendor ), dim_product AS ( SELECT * FROM dbo.Dim_Product ), dim_employee AS ( SELECT * FROM dbo.Dim_Employee ), po_lines_joined AS ( SELECT po.POID, po.PONumber, po.PODate, po.ExpectedDelivery, po.POStatus, po.VendorID, po.OrderedByID, po.ApprovedByID, po.RequisitionID, pol.LineNumber, pol.ItemID, pol.Quantity, pol.AgreedUnitPrice, pol.RequisitionLineID FROM source_purchase_orders po INNER JOIN source_purchase_order_lines pol ON pol.POID = po.POID ), po_with_source_dims AS ( SELECT plj.POID, plj.PONumber, plj.PODate, plj.ExpectedDelivery, plj.POStatus, plj.OrderedByID, plj.ApprovedByID, plj.RequisitionID, plj.LineNumber, plj.Quantity, plj.AgreedUnitPrice, plj.RequisitionLineID, src_vnd.VendorCode, src_itm.ItemCode, src_buyer.EmployeeCode AS BuyerCode, src_approver.EmployeeCode AS ApproverCode FROM po_lines_joined plj INNER JOIN source_vendors src_vnd ON src_vnd.VendorID = plj.VendorID INNER JOIN source_items src_itm ON src_itm.ItemID = plj.ItemID INNER JOIN source_employees src_buyer ON src_buyer.EmployeeID = plj.OrderedByID LEFT JOIN source_employees src_approver ON src_approver.EmployeeID = plj.ApprovedByID ), po_with_requisition AS ( SELECT psd.*, req.RequisitionNumber, req.RequisitionDate, rl.EstimatedUnitPrice FROM po_with_source_dims psd LEFT JOIN source_requisitions req ON req.RequisitionID = psd.RequisitionID LEFT JOIN source_requisition_lines rl ON rl.RequisitionLineID = psd.RequisitionLineID ), po_with_date_sks AS ( SELECT pwr.*, ISNULL(d_po.Date_SK, 0) AS PODate_SK, ISNULL(d_exp.Date_SK, 0) AS ExpectedDelivery_SK FROM po_with_requisition pwr LEFT JOIN dim_date d_po ON d_po.Date_SK = CAST(FORMAT(pwr.PODate, 'yyyyMMdd') AS INT) LEFT JOIN dim_date d_exp ON d_exp.Date_SK = CAST(FORMAT(pwr.ExpectedDelivery, 'yyyyMMdd') AS INT) ), po_with_dim_sks AS ( SELECT pwd.*, ISNULL(vnd.Vendor_SK, -1) AS Vendor_SK, ISNULL(prod.Product_SK, -1) AS Product_SK, ISNULL(emp_buyer.Employee_SK, -1) AS Buyer_Employee_SK, ISNULL(emp_approver.Employee_SK, -1) AS Approver_Employee_SK FROM po_with_date_sks pwd LEFT JOIN dim_vendor vnd ON vnd.Vendor_BK = pwd.VendorCode AND vnd.IsCurrent = 1 LEFT JOIN dim_product prod ON prod.Product_BK = pwd.ItemCode AND prod.IsCurrent = 1 LEFT JOIN dim_employee emp_buyer ON emp_buyer.Employee_BK = pwd.BuyerCode AND emp_buyer.IsCurrent = 1 LEFT JOIN dim_employee emp_approver ON emp_approver.Employee_BK = pwd.ApproverCode AND emp_approver.IsCurrent = 1 ), final AS ( SELECT PONumber AS PO_BK, LineNumber AS PO_Line_Number, RequisitionNumber AS Requisition_BK, PODate_SK, ExpectedDelivery_SK, Vendor_SK, Product_SK, Buyer_Employee_SK, Approver_Employee_SK, POStatus AS PO_Status, Quantity AS Quantity_Ordered, AgreedUnitPrice AS Agreed_Unit_Price, CAST(Quantity * AgreedUnitPrice AS DECIMAL(18,2)) AS PO_Line_Total, EstimatedUnitPrice AS Estimated_Unit_Price, CASE WHEN EstimatedUnitPrice IS NOT NULL THEN CAST((EstimatedUnitPrice - AgreedUnitPrice) * Quantity AS DECIMAL(18,2)) ELSE NULL END AS Price_Savings_vs_Estimate, CASE WHEN RequisitionDate IS NOT NULL THEN DATEDIFF(DAY, RequisitionDate, PODate) ELSE NULL END AS Approval_Duration_Days FROM po_with_dim_sks ) SELECT * FROM final
